Class Searcher

java.lang.Object
search.Searcher
public class Searcher extends Object
This class acts as the main search manager, grouping together all search functionalities available in the package.

It delegates specific searches (products, employees, orders, exchanges, packs, etc.) to their corresponding search classes, depending on the enabled SearchType.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Searcher

      public Searcher(SearchStoreProducts searchStore, SearchType... types)
      Creates the master searcher with specific search types enabled.
      Parameters:
      searchStore - the class used to search store products
      types - the types of searches that will be available

    • Searcher

      public Searcher(SearchStoreProducts searchStore)
      Creates the master searcher.
      Parameters:
      searchStore - the class used to search store products

  • Method Details

    • getStoreSearcher

      public SearchStoreProducts getStoreSearcher()
      Returns the store product searcher.
      Returns:
      the SearchStoreProducts instance

    • setTypes

      public void setTypes(SearchType... st)
      Sets the enabled search types.
      Parameters:
      st - the search types to be used

    • searchStoreProducts

      public List<StoreProduct> searchStoreProducts()
      Searches store products using the filters defined in SearchStoreProducts.
      Returns:
      a list of matching StoreProduct

    • searchByCategory

      public List<StoreProduct> searchByCategory(Category... c)
      Searches store products filtered by category.
      Parameters:
      c - the categories of the products to search
      Returns:
      a list of matching StoreProduct

    • searchPackByID

      public Pack searchPackByID(int id)
      Searches for a pack by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the pack
      Returns:
      the Pack if found, or null if not found

    • searchExchangeByID

      public Exchange searchExchangeByID(int id)
      Searches for an exchange by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the exchange
      Returns:
      the Exchange if found, or null if not found

    • searchOrderByID

      public Order searchOrderByID(int id)
      Searches for an order by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the order
      Returns:
      the Order if found, or null if not found

    • searchEmployeeByID

      public Employee searchEmployeeByID(int id)
      Searches for an employee by their ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the employee
      Returns:
      the Employee if found, or null if not found

    • browseSecondHandProduct

      public List<SecondHandProduct> browseSecondHandProduct()
      Retrieves all second-hand products sorted alphabetically.
      Returns:
      a list of SecondHandProduct, or null if the search type is not enabled

    • changeProductOrder

      public void changeProductOrder(boolean bool)
      Changes the ordering of the product search results.
      Parameters:
      bool - true for ascending order, false for descending

    • toggleProductOrder

      public void toggleProductOrder()
      It toggles the searcher's order between ascending and descending
